commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: The whole life of a good Christian is a holy longing to make progress.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Lord. Many were converted in the days of Esther, (viii. 17.) and the Pharisees were eager to make proselytes in all parts, when Christ preached, Matthew xxiii. 15., and Acts ii. 11. Yet we must go to the Church to see this fully accomplished. (Calmet)
